subcodes.first_line: O thou sincere servant of the Abha Beauty! Thy letters were received, and [I witnessed] thy sighs and moaning and weeping and lamentation in [this] calamity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی مکاتیب رسید و بر آه و ناله و گریه و زاری شما در مصیبت
subcodes.subjects: @Imam Husayn, @growth of the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @contention and conflict
